document_info.document_type: Excel Submission Data (Additional Insureds, Insurance History, Insured Locations)

business_description.nature_of_business: Freight / Transportation — operates warehouse and service/repair facilities across Ohio and Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number BWC-7853-4607 (2024); prior carriers: Hartford BWC-1879-5462, Auto-Owners BWC-6082-7301, Markel BWC-8729-1826, CNA BWC-2661-3820
Policy number GL-0007119 (2024); prior carriers: Hartford GL-0008063, Auto-Owners 0000003334, Markel 0000001612, CNA 0000006691

positives: No cancellations in any of the five prior policy years (2020–2024)
Stable insurance tenure — maintained continuous coverage with reputable carriers
Declining claim count trend: 4 claims (2020) rising to 13 (2023) but back to 10 (2024); low base year of 4 claims in 2020
Premium growth relatively modest over five years (~$73K increase from 2020 to 2024), suggesting controlled exposure growth
Mix of owned and leased locations indicates operational flexibility
concerns: Claims count peaked at 13 in 2023, representing the highest frequency in the five-year period
Loss ratio data is missing for all five years, limiting loss performance assessment
Several locations have missing Own/Lease designation (LOC-002, LOC-004, LOC-005), indicating incomplete location schedule data
Large total square footage across nine locations (735,000 sq ft) spread across two states increases property and liability exposure
Carrier changes every year for five consecutive years may suggest adverse experience or market-driven placement challenges
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year loss history from 2020 to 2024 shows claim counts of 4, 7, 12, 13, and 10 respectively. Total claims over the period: 46. Loss ratios were not provided. No policy cancellations. Total premiums over five years: $10,263,788.25. Annual premiums ranged from $2,014,565.01 (2022) to $2,088,513.96 (2024).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Great Lakes Freight Systems, Inc. operates nine locations across Ohio and Pennsylvania totaling approximately 735,000 square feet. Location types include warehouse (8 locations), service/repair (1 location), and office (1 location). Ohio locations are in Columbus, Independence, and Toledo. Pennsylvania locations are in Canonsburg, Philadelphia, and Harrisburg. The named insured maintains both owned and leased facilities.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Claim counts over the five most recent policy years are as follows: 2020 (CNA Financial) — 4 claims; 2021 (Markel Corporation) — 7 claims; 2022 (Auto-Owners Insurance) — 12 claims; 2023 (Hartford Financial Services) — 13 claims; 2024 (Hanover Insurance Group) — 10 claims. No loss ratios were provided. No cancellations were reported across any policy year.
